## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content performance, updates, and future planning.](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 7 articles staged for publishing, 3 pillar pages in Framer, 10 articles awaiting review](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Performance metrics positive: Sessions back to peak levels, LLM referrals near all-time high, 133 valuation-related keywords in top 10](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Galileo considering maintaining 7 content pieces/week for October (4 blogs, 3 additional pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [New CMS structure implemented for pillar pages under "/learn" collection](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

## Topics

### Health and Personal Updates

  - [Mara recovered from \~1 week of COVID](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Jackson celebrated 30th birthday, upcoming travel to Iowa, Vegas, and Seattle](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)

### Content Production Status

  - [7 articles staged last week, now published](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [3 pillar pages currently in Framer](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [10 articles awaiting client review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [On track to deliver 7 articles, prioritizing competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Upcoming focus: model pages](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Overall sessions back to peak levels (all-time high)](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [CAID sessions down but above 50% benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [GSC data: steady impressions and clicks after all-time high](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Branded impressions rising since June](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [133 valuation-related keywords in top 10](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [LLM referrals near all-time high (ChatGPT top source, followed by Perplexity, Gemini, Claude)](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Competitor comparison: Galileo at 327 top 10 keywords (slight dip), Arise steady at 903](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### CMS and Site Structure Updates

  - [New "/learn" collection in Framer/CMS for pillar pages](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

  - [First 3 pillar pages going live today (meeting day)](https://fathom.video/share/VRcWrzN9auyFVzv__y5iFg9s7XGPz6zs?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
